subject: A massive buzzard or eagle-like raptor in mid-strike, locked in combat with a robed druid figure who wields a staff; the bird's wings are spread and its beak open in a screech
description: A large brown-and-tan raptor with an enormous hooked yellow beak lunges through a forest clearing, wings flared as it strikes. A hooded druid figure with antler-like headgear or branches braces beneath the bird, holding a long wooden staff or branch as a weapon. Foliage and green forest ambience surround the figures; light filters through trees suggesting day in a wooded biome. The action is captured at the apex of the clash, with feathers, fabric, and limbs in motion.
foreground: buzzard raptor mid-strike attacking a robed druid with a staff
background: green forest clearing with foliage and filtered light
emotion: ferocity from the bird, braced defiance from the druid
